Earthing Technical Requirements.description: Install new Air break switch earthing as per EDI0006 & drawing B348252

Specific Earthing Standards.description: All OH line design as per MDI0031 & MCI0005

substation_works.description: Substation commissioning categorized as Customer Funded Non-Contestable Work

commissioning_responsibilities.description: Substation commissioning is categorized as Customer Funded Non-Contestable Work

clearances_and_standards.description: Compliance with MDI0031 requirements for substation works

items.funding_category: Reimbursements to be paid to Endeavour Energy by Customer

items.item_description: Network switching, substation commissioning, contract inspection and ancillary fees

LandInterestGuidelines.description: No specific mention of 'Land Interests' section or checkbox for 'NA' in the provided sections.

RequiredEasements.description: No explicit details regarding required easements for new HV/LV lines or substation sites found in the provided sections.

PropertyAccessConditions.description: No specific conditions regarding access to private property or creation of right-of-ways for Endeavour Energy assets found in the provided sections.

Mandatory Transaction References.description: Unique alphanumeric reference code ARP4983A2 must be quoted

Document Remittance and Restriction Requ.description: Email remittance copies to remittances@endeavourenergy.com.au; credit cards and cheques are not accepted

Invoice Policy.description: A formal Tax Invoice will be issued following the receipt of payment

SL_Works_Section.description: Relocate existing pole 283061, 283062 & 283063 to the new road alignment as per MDI0031 requirements.
Remove existing OH SL conductor from pole 283062 to pole 426121 and from pole 283062 to pole 283063.
Existing OH SL conductor to be redirected from pole 426129 to new pole 1 & pole 2.
Install new SL conductor 25mm^2 2C from new pole 2 to pole 426121 and from new pole 2 to pole 3.
Remove all existing street lighting on poles 283061 & 283063.
Install new streetlighting on new poles 1 & 3 as per LDI0001 requirements.
Install new additional luminaires and light pole as per the lighting assessment.

SL_Material_Funding.description: Customer Funded Contestable Works: All other works required.

SL_Standard_Compliance.description: Install new streetlighting on new poles 1 & 3 as per LDI0001 requirements.

Primary HV Method of Supply.description: Relocate existing pole 283061, 283062 & 283063 to the new road alignment as per MDI0031 requirements.
Remove existing OH HV conductor from poles 283061 to 283063.
Remove existing OH HV conductor from pole 283062 to pole 426121.
Install new ABS on new pole 3. New Air break switch earthing as per EDI0006 & drawing B348252
Install new OH HV conductor 19/3.25 AAC Neptune from new poles 1 to 3.
Install new OH HV conductor 7/4.50 AAC from new pole 2 to pole 426121.

HV Infrastructure Funding and Materials.description: Reimbursements to be paid to Endeavour Energy by Customer: Duct usage charge as required
Customer Funded Non-Contestable Works: Network switching, substation commissioning, contract inspection and ancillary fees.
Customer Funded Contestable Works: All other works required.

Compliance Standards.description: All OH line design as per MDI0031 & MCI0005.

LV Works.description: Relocate existing pole 283061, 283062 & 283063 to the new road alignment as per MDI0031 requirements.

Redirect the existing LV OH conductor to new poles 1 & 2. If the existing LV conductor length is insufficient, terminate existing LV conductor 7/4.50AAV on new pole 1 & install new span of LV bare 7/4.50AAC from new poles 1 to 2.
Remove existing OH LV conductor from pole 283062 to pole 426121.
Install new OH LV conductor 7/4.50AAC from new pole 2 to pole 426121.

Removal and Installation Requirements.description: Remove the Overhead (OH) LV cable currently located between pole ref '23' and pole ref '20' on the southern side of Elizabeth Drive.
String a new OH cable between pole ref '3' and pole ref '20' on the northern side of Elizabeth Drive.

Compliance Standards.description: Ensure all LV service works comply with the NSW Service and Installation Rules.
Confirm the design adheres to Endeavour Energy standards MDI0031 and MCI0005.

Service Connections.description: Locate the General section regarding the 'New OH road crossing service connection' intended to maintain existing services.

1. THIS DRAWING IS TO BE READ IN CONJUNCTION WITH THE RELEVANT ENDEAVOUR ENERGY NETWORK STANDARDS AND CONNECT ON POLICY. ENDEAVOUR ENERGY CONTACT PHONE: 131 081. DESIGN CERTIFICATION SHALL LAPSE WHERE: - (i) NOTICE OF INTENT HAS NOT BEEN RECEIVED WITHIN SIX (6) MONTHS OF THIS CERTIFICATION. OR (ii) WORKS COMPLETED CONSTRUCTION HAS BEEN INTERRUPTED FOR MORE THAN SIX (6) MONTHS WHERE DESIGN CERTIFICATION HAS LAPSED THE DESIGN MUST BE RESUBMITTED FOR CERTIFICATION BY THE ACCREDITED DESIGNER.
2. ATTENTION PERMANENT SURVEY MARKS MAY EXIST IN THIS AREA. THESE MARKS ARE TO BE LOCATED BY A SURVEYOR PRIOR TO COMMENCEMENT OF ANY WORKS.
3. ATTENTION ALL SERVICES SEARCHES MUST BE CHECKED BEFORE CONSTRUCTION.
4. WARNING LIVE ENDEAVOUR ENERGY CABLES AND OTHER SERVICES IN THIS AREA. PLEASE CONTACT DIAL BEFORE YOU DIG ON TELEPHONE 1100 FOR SEARCH TWO (2) DAYS PRIOR TO EXCAVATION.
5. ATTENTION SERVICE PROVIDER TO NOTIFY ENDEAVOUR ENERGY'S ASSET DATA CUSTOMER DEPARTMENT DAILY WHEN CABLE WORKS IS IN PROGRESS. TELEPHONE: 131 081.
6. OPERATIONAL LIMITS UNLESS APPROVED OTHERWISE, INTERRUPTION TO ANY CUSTOMER'S SUPPLY MUST BE AVOIDED. THE FOLLOWING ALTERNATIVES SHOULD BE CONSIDERED:- • MOBILE GENERATOR AND SUBSTATIONS; • LIVE LINE WORK; • DESIGN ALTERNATIVES; • LOW VOLTAGE PARALLELS; • WORK PRACTICES/STANDARDS; THE COST IS TO BE FUNDED BY THE CUSTOMER/DEVELOPER.
7. REIMBURSEMENTS WILL BE PAID TO THE NOMINATED PARTY ON THE LETTER OF INTENT AFTER THE WORKS HAVE BEEN COMPLETED AND THE LETTER OF ACCEPTANCE HAS BEEN ISSUED. THE REIMBURSED AMOUNT IS SHOWN IN THE FUNDING ARRANGEMENTS FOR SCOPE OF WORK. ANY DISAGREEMENT WITH THE AMOUNT SHOULD BE RESOLVED IN WRITING WITH ENDEAVOUR ENERGY PRIOR TO THE COMMENCEMENT OF WORKS.
